description: Triage queue for newly submitted issues before they enter the active tracker. Promoted and dismissed items remain for audit purposes.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: Issue title as submitted by the user.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Detailed issue description. Mapped to NextAction during promotion.

columns.name: DateSubmitted
columns.description: When the intake item was created.

columns.name: TriageStatus
columns.description: Pending = awaiting triage. Promoted = accepted via Power Automate flow. Dismissed = rejected via Dashboard. Accepted = accepted via Intake Review panel. Rejected = rejected via Intake Review panel.

columns.name: FunctionalGroup
columns.description: Functional group allocation for the submitted issue. Flows through to OFR_Issues on promotion/acceptance.

notes: Only items with TriageStatus = 'Pending' are displayed in the Power Apps intake gallery.
